title: CONTROLLER L'EFFICACITE DU NETTOYAGE ET DE LA DESINFECTION DANS LES POULAILLERS
subtitle: Test de l'efficacité du N&D en déterminant la charge bactérienne restante sur les surfaces nettoyées
description: A guide to monitoring the effectiveness of cleaning and disinfection procedures in poultry houses through hygienograms and bacterial load measurements. It outlines a seven-step protocol, regulated sampling frequencies per production cycle, and decision criteria based on CFU scores to maintain biosecurity.
